##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=K(Mg,Ti,Fe)_3_[(Si,Al)_4_O_10_](O,F)_2_
##LOCALITY=Graulay, Hillesheim, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Dark brown to almost black platy crystals, associated with schorlomite, pyroxene, leucite and nepheline

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
